label: **Neo Features**
**NOTE: Not all the options are available here, some of them are still in development, I'm working to add them all soon thanks for your patience.**
**Features**
General
Disable all the features.
**Theme**
General
Disable only the styling of the theme not the features.
Feature: Neo Color Fixer
Disable the correction of the color scheme, if you disable that, the theme will not be able to override the color scheme.
Fix the background color of the browser to the default color based on the color scheme.
Force the color scheme to be applied to all modes, including the first mode of the gradient generator.
Feature: Neo Essentials
Disable Neo Essentials features, the essentials tab area won't expand on hover and will keep it's original size and behavior.
Disable Neo Essentials when the sidebar is in collapsed mode.
Disable Neo Essentials when the sidebar is in expanded mode.
Feature: Neo Findbar
Disable Neo Findbar feature, the find bar will return to the default position and style of the browser.
Feature: Neo Footer
Disable the footer, the footer will return to the default position and style of the browser.
The footer area will expand to fit the content inside it, this only works when the sidebar is in expanded mode.
Feature: Neo Glance
This feature fix and issue when transparent tabs are enabled, I recommend you to not disable this feature.
Feature: Neo Media
Disable the media controls, the media controls will return to the default position and style of the browser.
Feature: Neo Menus
Disable the menus customization for linux platform, the menus will return to the default style of the browser.
Feature: Neo Search
This will disable all the features related to the search bar.
This will disable icon hiding on the search bar.
Feature: Neo Sidebar Panel
This will disable all the features related to the sidebar panel.
This will disable the autohide feature of the sidebar panel.
